tools.name: get_vehicles
tools.description: List all available vehicles with capacity and base rates. Use this to help the customer choose the right vehicle for their trip.

tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Calculate the exact price for a private chauffeur transfer. Returns prices for all available vehicles AND a quote_id valid for 15 minutes. Always call this before book_ride and pass the quote_id to book_ride — it locks the price and prevents drift. IMPORTANT: pickup_date must be in dd/mm/yyyy format

tools.name: book_ride
tools.description: Create a secure payment link to book a private chauffeur transfer. The reservation is created automatically ONLY after the customer completes payment. REQUIRED: call get_quote first and pass the resulting quote_id + the chosen vehicle_id. The price is taken from the stored quote (not from any price

tools.name: book_meetgreet
tools.description: Create a secure payment link for a VIP Meet & Greet booking, with optional transfer combo. M&G prices are FIXED (CDG/Orly 250€ base for 2 pax + 50€/extra, Gare du Nord 500€ per STARTED group of 2 pax (1-2=500€, 3-4=1000€, 5-6=1500€), Gare de Lyon 350€ + 75€/extra) — do NOT call get_quote for the M&G

tools.name: resolve_location
tools.description: Resolve a free-text location (city, airport, hotel, station, full address) to a canonical address + coordinates, using the same geocoder that Zeplan consumes for bookings. Use this BEFORE get_quote when the customer gives a fuzzy pickup/drop-off (e.g. 'CDG', 'Le Bristol', 'Gare du Nord', raw GPS). R

tools.name: send_driver_contact
tools.description: Email the booking's client their assigned driver's first name + phone. Pass `email` if you already have the client's address (e.g. from Zeplan get-booking); otherwise WP looks it up on the booking post. Returns { sent, to (masked), client_phone }. Voice agent use.

tools.name: resolve_flight
tools.description: Resolve a flight number to its airports, terminals, scheduled times, and status. Use BEFORE book_ride whenever the customer provides a flight number so that pickup time and terminal are correct. Input is tolerant: accepts 'AF007', 'AF 007', 'AF-007', 'af7', 'AFR007' — the tool normalizes internally.

tools.name: resolve_train
tools.description: Resolve a TRAIN NUMBER to its route, stations and scheduled times via the official SNCF API (covers TGV inOui/Ouigo, TER, Intercités, TGV Lyria, Eurostar and international TGVs — everything serving a French station). Use whenever a customer books a station pickup/drop-off or a station Meet & Greet a

tools.name: get_service_info
tools.description: Get information about MyDriverParis services, coverage areas, airports served, and policies. Use this to answer customer questions.

tools.name: get_cancellation_policy
tools.description: Get the full cancellation, refund and modification policy. Use this whenever a customer asks about cancelling, changing, or refunds — never guess the policy.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "get_quote" stacks urgency/override words (important, always). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Calculate the exact price for a private chauffeur transfer. Returns prices for all available vehicles AND a quote_id valid for 15 minutes. Always call this befo…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "book_meetgreet" stacks urgency/override words (always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Create a secure payment link for a VIP Meet & Greet booking, with optional transfer combo. M&G prices are FIXED (CDG/Orly 250€ base for 2 pax + 50€/extra, Gare …

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: send_driver_contact · Private data: get_quote, book_ride, send_driver_contact · Public sink: send_driver_contact · Destructive: get_quote, resolve_location, resolve_train.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: send_driver_contact · Private data: get_quote, book_ride, send_driver_contact · Public sink: send_driver_contact · Destructive: get_quote, resolve_location, resolve_train

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

detail: Tool "book_meetgreet" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Create a secure payment link for a VIP Meet & Greet booking, with optional transfer combo. M&G prices are FIXED (CDG/Orly 250€ base for 2 pax + 50€/extra, Gare du Nord 500€ per STARTED group of 2 pax (1-2=500€, 3-4=1000€, 5-6=1500€), Gare de Lyon 350€ + 75€/extra) — do NOT call get_quote for the M&G" → after: "Create a secure payment link for a VIP Meet & Greet booking, with optional transfer combo. Available locations: CDG, Orly, Gare de Lyon — Meet & Greet is NO LONGER offered at Gare du Nord (do not quote or book it there). M&G prices are FIXED (CDG/Orly 250€ base for 2 pax + 50€/extra, Gare de Lyon 35"

remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
